allegation: Wounding with intent, contrary to section 18 of the Offences Against the Person Act 1861

cpsChase.label: hospital records
cpsChase.draft: Please provide hospital records or confirm in writing why it is not available.

cpsChase.draft: Please provide consultant medical report or confirm in writing why it is not available.

cpsChase.label: injury photographs
cpsChase.draft: Please provide injury photographs or confirm in writing why it is not available.

courtLine: The defence asks the court to record that hospital records, consultant report, and injury photographs remain outstanding before injury causation or extent is treated as fixed.
doNotOverstate: Do not state "final medical report" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding
Do not state "medical report proves" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding
Do not state "medical is consistent" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding
